name: src-edit-proposal-rigor
description: A strict pre-proposal workflow for any change that edits `src/` code.

resources.description: Concrete example/template for proposals that collapse a special runtime mode back into normal main-chat tool-category routing.
Guardrail for src proposals when ProposalStore source-read evidence validation ignores snake_case executor_prompt.
Guardrail for resuming src/package migration work after a gateway restart: verify actual approvals, command/source edits, dirty state, and pending build checks before summarizing.
